title: Swirl Colour Run Remover Laundry Sheets - Avoid Colour Transfer in Mixed Washes, Ideal for Brightly Coloured Clothing, Washing Sheets for Colour Protection, Color Catcher, 3x12 pack + Cheeroo Magnet

features: Prevents Colour Runs - The Swirl Colour Run Remover laundry sheets are specially treated to prevent the transfer of colour from one garment to another during washing, ensuring your clothes retain their original colour.
Absorbs Loose Dye - The washing machine sheets effectively absorb any loose dye that is released during washing, making it ideal for loads containing either dark or brightly coloured clothing.

Easy to Use - Simply put a Swirl Colour Run Remover sheet in your machine wash to prevent colour runs. Place 1 sheet at the back of the washing machine. Add and wash using normal laundry detergent. It's an easy and convenient way to maintain the vibrancy of your clothes.

For Mixed Washes - The compact and lightweight design of colour run catcher laundry sheets makes them perfect for travel. These wash sheets are great for all types of clothing and ensure that your clothes won't bleed or fade during washing.
Free Cheeroo Magnet - Each laundry set contains 3x Swirl Colour Run Remover, 12 pack each (total 36) plus lovely free Cheeroo Magnet for your fridge or car that cheers you up!
description: Product description Keep your clothes looking vibrant and new with Swirl Colour Run Remover. This pack contains 12 specially treated laundry sheets that are designed to prevent the transfer of colours from one garment to another during washes. Ideal for loads containing either dark or brightly coloured clothing, these stain removers work effectively by absorbing any loose dye released during washing. Say goodbye to the worry of colour runs in mixed washes and embrace the convenience of washing all your clothes together with confidence. Not only do these washing machine sheets protect your clothes from colour runs, but they also help your clothes retain their original colour after multiple washes. Simply put a Swirl Colour Run Remover Sheet in your machine wash and watch it work its magic. These colour collector sheets are your ultimate laundry companion, ensuring that your clothes stay as vibrant and fresh as the day you bought them. Ingredients Run Remover Sheet
